data: {"generalSituation":"Winds will be weak over Guangdong today. There will be coastal mist in the morning and it will be rather warm during the day. Under the influence of an easterly airstream, it will be windier over the coast of southern China tomorrow and over the weekend. A band of clouds will also cover the region. With the easterly airstream moderating, the weather will improve gradually over the coast of Guangdong early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260319","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
